summary: Plan mode classification only. Keep #92242 as the live canonical issue for the Telegram delivery sent-message ledger regression, keep #92310 related but not merge/close due failed real-behavior proof, and route #92420 to central security handling because the job explicitly marks it as a security-signal ref.
